name: aoifmsp
description: AOIFMSP platform contracts, services, and application shells

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck -w @aoifmsp/functions && npm run typecheck -w @aoifmsp/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aoifmsp/web && npm run build -w @aoifmsp/functions
